title: geum × spurium
intro: Geum × spurium, also known as the strawberry avens, is a hybrid plant species within the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have a potential role in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits associated with Geum × spurium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Geum × spurium can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support overall health and well-being, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
